# section 1: settrace round-trip
None
True
None
# section 2: call/line/return event sequence
[('f', 'call'), ('f', 'line'), ('f', 'line'), ('f', 'line'), ('f', 'return')]
# section 3: per-frame f_trace replacement
[('global', 'g', 'call'), ('local', 'g', 'line'), ('local', 'g', 'return')]
# section 4: setprofile fires call/return without line
[('h', 'call'), ('h', 'return')]
False
# section 5: disabling trace mid-execution
('runner', 'call')
done
